items.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
items.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

items.title: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
items.summary: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.

items.title: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
items.summary: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 盧比歐稱川習會可能談到台灣　警告勿破壞區域穩定
items.summary: 美國總統川普預計5月14日至15日出訪北京，美國國務卿盧比歐今天示警，在川普出訪前一週不應對台灣採取任何「破壞穩定」的行動，並表示台灣可能列入川習會討論議題。  綜合法新社與路透社報導，盧比...…

items.title: 小泉訪菲 升級防衛合作
items.summary: 〔駐日特派員林翠儀／東京五日報導〕日本防衛大臣小泉進次郎五日抵達馬尼拉，與菲律賓國防部長鐵歐多洛舉行會談，雙方就菲國向日本採購中古「阿武隈級」護衛艦等事宜進行協商，一旦實現，將成為日本實質解禁武器出口之後的首宗交易。日本媒體報導，若菲律賓引進該艦，日本將可在當地設立整備據點，增加自衛隊可使用的設施。…
